messages.content:
It seems you're attempting to activate a Python virtual environment. To do so, you'll need to run the command in PowerShell, but you'll likely encounter an error due to the script execution policy. Run the following command to bypass this: 
Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass 
Then, you can activate your venv by running: 
& c:\JarvisAI\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1

Elon Musk is a entrepreneur and business magnate, best known for founding companies like SpaceX, Tesla, and PayPal. Born on June 28, 1971, in Pretoria, South Africa, he has become one of the most successful and influential figures in the tech industry. Musk is known for his ambitious goals, such as establishing a human settlement on Mars and making sustainable energy a reality. Currently, he is one of the richest people in the world, Anugrah Dubey.
